overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a wizarding world game showing a student character in house robes exploring a Gothic castle interior. The character transitions from a dimly lit library through a narrow staircase into a grand sunlit hall with high vaulted ceilings and other students.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow library corridor between tall bookshelves

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the library corridor between towering wooden bookshelves

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling dark wooden bookshelves filled with leather-bound volumes
floor-to-ceiling dark wooden bookshelves filled with leather-bound volumes
ornate stone fireplace with active burning fire and carved wooden mantel
upholstered reading chair with wooden legs
antique terrestrial globe on wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit library corridor flanked by towering wooden bookshelves filled with books. A warm fire burns in a stone fireplace on the right, while a green armchair and globe stand occupy the left side of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: library transition area with large arched windows

events.description: exits narrow corridor into brighter library section with visible Gothic windows
approaching large arched doorway with bright natural light streaming through

agents.ego_description: walking toward the arched exit of the library, passing wooden display cases on the left

entered.detail: large stone archway leading to the staircase
tall arched window with intricate iron grillework
glass-topped wooden case displaying open books
heavy wooden door with metal studs leading to stairs

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow corridor into a brighter section of the library with large arched windows visible on the left. The space opens slightly as the character approaches a heavy wooden door on the right and an arched exit ahead, passing display cases with books.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden staircase with paneled walls

events.description: passes through wooden door into enclosed stairwell with paneled walls

agents.ego_description: climbing the polished wooden stairs toward the upper level door

entered.detail: polished wooden stairs with carved banisters and red carpet runner
heavy wooden door with decorative panels at the top of the stairs
lit wall-mounted torch providing warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed stairwell through the wooden door and begins ascending the polished wooden staircase. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the paneled walls as the character climbs toward the upper level door.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand castle entrance hall with high Gothic vaulted ceilings

events.description: opens door and enters the grand hall with dramatic natural lighting from high windows
bright sunlight streams through high Gothic windows illuminating the stone hall
character looks upward at the high windows and vaulted ceiling while walking

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall, observing the Gothic architecture and other students, approaching the large central door

notable_agents.action: group of students in dark robes conversing near the grand staircase
student walking across the marble floor toward the left side

entered.detail: sweeping stone staircase with carved balustrade leading to upper balconies
massive Gothic columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling
tall arched window with stone tracery allowing bright sunlight to enter
massive wooden double doors with metal studs and intricate Gothic carvings
upper level stone walkway with decorative railing

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast, sunlit grand hall with soaring Gothic architecture, massive stone pillars, and a sweeping staircase. Other students in robes are scattered throughout the space. The character walks across the marble floor toward an imposing ornate wooden door at the far end, pausing to look up at the high windows and vaulted ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, dimly lit confines of a Gothic library into the expansive brilliance of a sunlit grand hall. It begins in a narrow corridor flanked by towering bookshelves and a warm stone fireplace, moving past a green armchair and globe before the space opens into a brighter library section with large arched windows and display cases. The camera then transitions through a heavy wooden door into an enclosed stairwell, ascending polished wooden steps illuminated by the warm glow of wall sconces. Finally, the scene expands dramatically as the character emerges into a vast hall of soaring Gothic architecture and massive stone pillars, crossing a marble floor past other students toward an imposing ornate door under a high vaulted ceiling.
